name: claude-watch
description: Plugins that feed live session state to the claude-watch tray app.

plugins.name: permission-monitor
plugins.description: Writes each session's live permission mode to ~/.claude/sessions/{id}.mode for claude-watch.

plugins.name: claude-watch
plugins.description: Slash commands to control claude-watch from a session: /afk toggles external notifications, /history opens the history panel.
